daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving thoughtful rebel energy. The cosmos is nudging you to trust your instincts about something you've been questioning. It's okay to be different—that's literally your superpower.
daily.love: Someone around you is picking up on your authenticity today. Whether you're single or coupled up, lean into genuine conversations. Real connection happens when you stop performing and just be.
daily.career: Your creative wavelength is firing on all cylinders. This is the energy to pitch that unconventional idea or approach a problem from a totally new angle. Trust that your perspective has real value.
daily.health: Your nervous system could use some grounding today. Try something tactile—maybe a walk, some journaling, or even just sitting with a warm drink. Small rituals of self-care are your friend rn.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to get real with yourself about what you actually want versus what you think you should want. Mercury's moving in your favor, so conversations hit different—speak your truth without overthinking it.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, there's a vibe shift around authenticity. If you've been holding back feelings, the cosmic timing supports putting them out there. Vulnerability isn't weakness; it's literally your superpower rn.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving is peaked this week. That project or idea you've been sitting on? The energy's aligned for you to pitch it or take the next step. Trust your instincts—they're unusually sharp.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel overstimulated midweek, so prioritize grounding activities that feel good to you. Whether that's movement, quiet time, or being around people who get you—listen to what your body's asking for.
